SEARCH
Package clientGui.user

Class RegisterSubscriberController

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.user.RegisterSubscriberController
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController
public class RegisterSubscriberController extends MainNavigator implements MessageListener<Object>
Controller for registering a new subscriber. Handles user input and communication with the server to create a subscriber.
